017package org.apache.juneau.rest.common.utils;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020
021/**
022 * HTTP utilities.
023 *
024 */
025public class HttpUtils {
026
027   /**
028    * Prevents instantiation.
029    */
030   private HttpUtils() {}
031
032   private static final String[] LC_METHODS = { "get", "put", "post", "delete", "options", "head", "connect", "trace", "patch" };
033   private static final String[] UC_METHODS = { "GET", "PUT", "POST", "DELETE", "OPTIONS", "HEAD", "CONNECT", "TRACE", "PATCH" };
034
035   /**
036    * Given a method name, infers the REST method name.
037    *
038    * @param m The Java method.
039    * @param detectMethod Whether we should auto-detect the HTTP method name from the Java method name.
040    * @param def The default HTTP method if not detected.
041    * @return The REST method name, or the default value if not found.
042    */
043   @SuppressWarnings({
044      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTTP method detection
045   })
046   public static String detectHttpMethod(Method m, boolean detectMethod, String def) {
047      String n = m.getName();
048      if (detectMethod) {
049         if (n.startsWith("do") && n.length() > 2) {
050            String n2 = n.substring(2).toUpperCase();
051            for (var t : UC_METHODS)
052               if (n2.equals(t))
053                  return n2;
054         }
055         for (var t : LC_METHODS)
056            if (n.startsWith(t) && (n.length() == t.length() || Character.isUpperCase(n.charAt(t.length()))))
057               return t.toUpperCase();
058      }
059      return def;
060   }
061
062   /**
063    * Given a Java method, infers the REST path.
064    *
065    * @param m The Java method.
066    * @param method The HTTP method name if it's known.
067    * @return The REST path or <jk>null</jk> if not detected.
068    */
069   @SuppressWarnings({
070      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for HTTP path detection
071   })
072   public static String detectHttpPath(Method m, String method) {
073      String n = m.getName();
074      if (method == null) {
075         if (n.startsWith("do") && n.length() > 2) {
076            String n2 = n.substring(2).toUpperCase();
077            for (var t : UC_METHODS)
078               if (n2.equals(t))
079                  return "/";
080         }
081         for (var t : LC_METHODS) {
082            if (n.startsWith(t) && (n.length() == t.length() || Character.isUpperCase(n.charAt(t.length())))) {
083               return '/' + java.beans.Introspector.decapitalize(n.substring(t.length()));
084            }
085         }
086      } else {
087         if (n.equalsIgnoreCase(method) || n.equals("do") || n.equals("_"))
088            return "/";
089         if (n.startsWith(method) && (n.length() == method.length() || Character.isUpperCase(n.charAt(method.length())))) {
090            return '/' + java.beans.Introspector.decapitalize(n.substring(method.length()));
091         }
092      }
093      return '/' + n;
094   }
095}
